lines.speaker: Freald
lines.text: Greetings traveller. What brings you to my residence?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You keep a pet bat? That's a bit odd.

lines.speaker: Freald
lines.text: Yes traveller, this is not out of the ordinary for us. The bats respond well to the powers of the dark altar after being drawn here by the river of blood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I hope he keeps you 'mused.
